summary: Populate checkout TrackURL and redact remaining customer-name fields in verify-mode dumps.
reason: Agent callers needed the order tracking URL after checkout, and PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 output still exposed CustomerName plus paymentCard firstname and lastname.
validated_outcome: Build and vet passed. Verify-mode dry-run redacted all customer and payment name/phone fields, and response parsing populated TrackURL from order.orderToken.
